caption: In a room with vertically paneled wooden walls, a woman with glasses and dark hair tied back stands behind a podium, addressing an audience. She is wearing a white blouse under a black vest with white decorative patterns and a red accent. Several people are seated in front of her, viewed from behind; they include individuals with blonde and brown hair, some wearing maroon or blue clothing. Two microphones on stands are positioned in front of the speaker. The woman is speaking and gesturing slightly with her hands while holding a piece of paper. In the lower right area of the scene, a white graphic tag contains the text "ORCA" in black capital letters. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains at the podium, continuing her speech as the camera angle and the positions of the audience members remain consistent.
